scripts.build: bun run icons:build && bun run --cwd apps/vadivam-internal build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.dev: bun run icons:build && bun run --cwd apps/web dev
scripts.test:vadivam: bun run icons:build && publint packages/vadivam && bun test tests/vadivam.test.mjs
scripts.test:react:unit: bun run icons:build && bun test --preload ./tests/setup/happydom.ts tests/vadivam-react/*.client.test.mjs && bun test tests/vadivam-react/*.ssr.test.mjs tests/vadivam-react/exports.test.mjs
scripts.test:vadivam-react: bun run icons:build && publint packages/vadivam-react && bun run test:react:unit
scripts.packages:check: bun run test:vadivam && bun run test:vadivam-react
scripts.test: bun run icons:test && bun run test:vadivam-internal && bun run packages:check && bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run test:integration
